tasks.label: install-flutter-via-puro
tasks.command: puro --version; puro install stable; puro global stable; flutter --version

tasks.label: install-flutter-sdk-git
tasks.command: if (!(Test-Path C:\Users\karth\flutter)) { git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable C:\Users\karth\flutter }; $env:Path='C:\Users\karth\flutter\bin;'+$env:Path; flutter --version

tasks.label: start-docker-service
tasks.command: Start-Service com.docker.service; Get-Service com.docker.service | Select-Object Name,Status,StartType

tasks.label: check-git-process-again
tasks.command: Get-Process git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object Count

tasks.label: flutter-dir-check
tasks.command: if (Test-Path 'C:\Users\karth\flutter') { Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\karth\flutter' -Force | Select-Object Name } else { Write-Output 'NO_FLUTTER_DIR' }

tasks.label: reset-flutter-clone
tasks.command: Get-Process git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; if (Test-Path 'C:\Users\karth\flutter') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'C:\Users\karth\flutter' }; git clone --depth 1 --filter=blob:none https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable C:\Users\karth\flutter

tasks.label: check-android-commands
tasks.command: where.exe adb; where.exe sdkmanager; where.exe avdmanager; where.exe emulator

tasks.label: verify-android-studio-exe
tasks.command: if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\bin\studio64.exe') { Write-Output 'ANDROID_STUDIO_INSTALLED' } else { Write-Output 'ANDROID_STUDIO_MISSING' }

tasks.label: verify-studio-path-again
tasks.command: if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\bin\studio64.exe') { Write-Output 'ANDROID_STUDIO_INSTALLED' } else { Write-Output 'ANDROID_STUDIO_MISSING' }

tasks.label: check-android-studio-path
tasks.command: if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\bin\studio64.exe') { Write-Output 'ANDROID_STUDIO_INSTALLED' } else { Write-Output 'ANDROID_STUDIO_MISSING' }

tasks.label: check-android-studio-path
tasks.command: if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\bin\studio64.exe') { Write-Output 'ANDROID_STUDIO_INSTALLED' } else { Write-Output 'ANDROID_STUDIO_MISSING' }

tasks.label: check-android-commands
tasks.command: where.exe adb; where.exe sdkmanager; where.exe avdmanager; where.exe emulator

tasks.label: find-android-sdk
tasks.command: $paths=@('C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk','C:\Android\Sdk'); foreach($p in $paths){ if(Test-Path $p){ Write-Output "SDK_FOUND:$p" } }; if(!(Test-Path 'C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk') -and !(Test-Path 'C:\Android\Sdk')){ Write-Output 'SDK_NOT_FOUND' }

tasks.label: check-android-commands
tasks.command: where.exe adb; where.exe sdkmanager; where.exe avdmanager; where.exe emulator

tasks.label: detect-sdk-location
tasks.command: $candidates=@('C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk','C:\Android\Sdk'); $found=$false; foreach($p in $candidates){ if(Test-Path $p){ Write-Output "SDK_FOUND:$p"; $found=$true } }; if(-not $found){ Write-Output 'SDK_NOT_FOUND' }

tasks.label: find-sdkmanager-now
tasks.command: where.exe sdkmanager; where.exe sdkmanager.bat; where.exe avdmanager

tasks.label: inspect-sdk-folders
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name

tasks.label: install-android-cmdline-tools-manual
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $sdk='C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk'; $tmp='C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Temp\android-cmdline-tools.zip'; $repoXml='C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Temp\android-repository.xml'; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://dl.google.com/android/repository/repository2-1.xml' -OutFile $repoXml; $content=Get-Content $repoXml -Raw; $m=[regex]::Match($content,'commandlinetools-win-\d+_latest\.zip'); if(-not $m.Success){ throw 'Could not locate commandlinetools package name in repository xml'; }; $zipName=$m.Value; $url='https://dl.google.com/android/repository/'+$zipName; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $tmp; $dstRoot=Join-Path $sdk 'cmdline-tools'; if(Test-Path $dstRoot){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $dstRoot }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dstRoot | Out-Null; Expand-Archive -Path $tmp -DestinationPath $dstRoot -Force; $src=Join-Path $dstRoot 'cmdline-tools'; $latest=Join-Path $dstRoot 'latest'; if(Test-Path $latest){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $latest }; Rename-Item -Path $src -NewName 'latest'; Write-Output ('CMDLINE_TOOLS_INSTALLED:'+ $zipName)

tasks.label: verify-cmdline-tools-files
tasks.command: if (Test-Path 'C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools\latest\bin\sdkmanager.bat') { Write-Output 'SDKMANAGER_READY' } else { Write-Output 'SDKMANAGER_MISSING' }; if (Test-Path 'C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools\latest\bin\avdmanager.bat') { Write-Output 'AVDMANAGER_READY' } else { Write-Output 'AVDMANAGER_MISSING' }

tasks.label: install-cmdline-tools-explicit
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $sdk='C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk'; $zip='C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Temp\commandlinetools-win-latest.zip'; $url='https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-win-15641748_latest.zip'; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $zip; $dst='C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools'; if(Test-Path $dst){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $dst }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dst | Out-Null; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $dst -Force; Rename-Item -Path (Join-Path $dst 'cmdline-tools') -NewName 'latest'; Write-Output 'CMDLINE_TOOLS_READY'

tasks.label: verify-cmdline-tools-ready
tasks.command: if (Test-Path 'C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools\latest\bin\sdkmanager.bat') { Write-Output 'SDKMANAGER_READY' } else { Write-Output 'SDKMANAGER_MISSING' }; if (Test-Path 'C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools\latest\bin\avdmanager.bat') { Write-Output 'AVDMANAGER_READY' } else { Write-Output 'AVDMANAGER_MISSING' }

tasks.label: install-cmdline-tools-clean
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $sdk='C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk'; $zip='C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Temp\commandlinetools-win-latest-2.zip'; $extract='C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Temp\cmdline-tools-extract'; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-win-15641748_latest.zip' -OutFile $zip; if(Test-Path $extract){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $extract }; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $extract -Force; $src=Join-Path $extract 'cmdline-tools'; if(!(Test-Path $src)){ throw 'Expected cmdline-tools folder missing in extracted zip' }; $dstRoot=Join-Path $sdk 'cmdline-tools'; if(Test-Path $dstRoot){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $dstRoot }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dstRoot | Out-Null; Move-Item -Path $src -Destination (Join-Path $dstRoot 'latest'); Write-Output 'CMDLINE_TOOLS_INSTALLED_CLEAN'

tasks.label: verify-cmdline-tools-again
tasks.command: if (Test-Path 'C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools\latest\bin\sdkmanager.bat') { Write-Output 'SDKMANAGER_READY' } else { Write-Output 'SDKMANAGER_MISSING' }; if (Test-Path 'C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools\latest\bin\avdmanager.bat') { Write-Output 'AVDMANAGER_READY' } else { Write-Output 'AVDMANAGER_MISSING' }

tasks.label: verify-sdkmanager-after-install
tasks.command: if (Test-Path 'C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools\latest\bin\sdkmanager.bat') { Write-Output 'SDKMANAGER_READY' } else { Write-Output 'SDKMANAGER_MISSING' }; if (Test-Path 'C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools\latest\bin\avdmanager.bat') { Write-Output 'AVDMANAGER_READY' } else { Write-Output 'AVDMANAGER_MISSING' }

tasks.label: create-avd-pixel
tasks.command: $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT='C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk'; $env:ANDROID_HOME='C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk'; if (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\.android\avd\sportsbuddy_api36.avd") { Write-Output 'AVD_EXISTS' } else { 'no' | & 'C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools\latest\bin\avdmanager.bat' create avd -n sportsbuddy_api36 -k "system-images;android-36.1;google_apis;x86_64" -d pixel_6 -f }

tasks.label: create-avd-api34
tasks.command: $env:JAVA_HOME='C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr'; $env:PATH='C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr\bin;'+$env:PATH; cmd /c "echo no|\"C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools\latest\bin\avdmanager.bat\" create avd -n sportsbuddy_api34 -k \"system-images;android-34;google_apis;x86_64\" -d pixel_6 -f"

tasks.label: check-ndk-installed
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\ndk' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; if (Test-Path 'C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\ndk\28.2.13676358\source.properties') { Write-Output 'NDK_READY' } else { Write-Output 'NDK_NOT_READY' }

tasks.label: wait-for-emulator-device
tasks.command: $env:Path='C:\Users\karth\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools;'+$env:Path; adb -s emulator-5554 wait-for-device; adb -s emulator-5554 shell getprop sys.boot_completed

tasks.label: mcp-dependency-health-check
tasks.command: npm.cmd view @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem version && npm.cmd view @modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres version && npm.cmd view @tmhs/docker-mcp version && "C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin\docker.exe" --version && powershell -NoProfile -Command "try { (Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Method Head 'https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp').StatusCode } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode } else { $_.Exception.Message } }"

tasks.label: mcp-dependency-health-check-2
tasks.command: npm.cmd view @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem version; npm.cmd view @modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres version; npm.cmd view @tmhs/docker-mcp version; & "C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin\docker.exe" --version; powershell -NoProfile -Command "try { (Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Method Head 'https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp').StatusCode } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode } else { $_.Exception.Message } }"

tasks.label: backend-build-and-test
tasks.command: Set-Location backend/sports-buddy-api; npm.cmd install; npm.cmd run build; npm.cmd test -- --runInBand

tasks.label: backend-verify-all
tasks.command: Set-Location backend/sports-buddy-api; npm.cmd run build; npm.cmd test -- --runInBand; npm.cmd run test:e2e -- --runInBand

tasks.label: backend-verify-all-2
tasks.command: Set-Location backend/sports-buddy-api; npm.cmd run build; npm.cmd test -- --runInBand; npm.cmd run test:e2e -- --runInBand

tasks.label: git-init-and-verify
tasks.command: git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree; git log --oneline -1; git status --short

tasks.label: git-init-commit-explicit-cwd
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\Users\karth\Sportsbuddy; git init; git add .; git commit -m "chore: initialize monorepo and MVP backend APIs"; git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree; git log --oneline -1; git status --short
